Flavor-Snack DIY Index: How often consumers attempt to recreate a flavor at home
Flavor Social Shareability Index: How likely a flavor is to be posted or shared online
Consumption Intent: Expressed desire and likelihood to purchase or try a flavor
Flavor Advocacy Index: How strongly consumers recommend a flavor to friends and family
Health-Indulgence Tension Index: Degree of conflict between guilt and desire around a flavor
Gifting / Sharing Index: How often a flavor is associated with giving or sharing occasions
